market_size.sam: $28.5B — Application Security Testing + DevSecOps + CTEM (2026 est.)
market_size.som: $2.5B — Mid-market and enterprise CTEM/Decision Intelligence platforms (initial addressable)

market_growth.cybersecurity_vc_2025: $13.97B across 392 VC rounds (47% YoY) + $18-21B total incl. growth equity across 820 deals
market_growth.ma_jan_2026: 34-38 deals — 3rd highest monthly count ever, ~477 projected annually
market_growth.ma_2026_trend: Sovereign M&A — US vendors acquiring EU firms for NIS2/CRA compliance. Consolidation in identity, cloud posture, automated risk.
market_growth.gartner_ctem_prediction: Organizations with CTEM programs are 3x less likely to suffer a breach by 2026 (Gartner)
market_growth.agentic_ai_adoption: 67% of orgs using agentic AI. 48% believe agentic AI = top attack vector by EOY 2026. Only 29% prepared to secure agentic AI.
market_growth.mcp_adoption_forecast: 30% of enterprise app vendors will launch MCP servers in 2026 (Forrester)
market_growth.mcp_security_crisis: 30 CVEs in MCP ecosystem in ~15 months. 36.7% of 7,000+ MCP servers vulnerable to SSRF.
market_growth.webmcp_chrome: Browser-native MCP in Chrome early preview (Mar 2026)
market_growth.cisa_kev_entries: 1,536 as of v2026.03.05. +7 since Mar 3. 2026 pace: ~270/year
market_growth.vllm_status: v0.16.0 — mature production ecosystem. Best hardware flexibility (AMD + NVIDIA).
market_growth.sglang_status: v0.5.8. 400K+ GPU deployments. De facto standard. 16,200 TPS on H100. RadixAttention: 5x faster for agent workflows.
market_growth.claude_code_security: Feb 20, 2026 — 500+ zero-days found, cyber stocks dropped, industry disruption
market_growth.anthropic_pentagon_crisis: Feb 27: Blacklisted as supply chain risk. Mar 3: 900+ employees sign open letter. Mar 5: Amodei back at DoD negotiating table. Legal challenge looming.
market_growth.openai_pentagon_deal: Feb 27-28: OpenAI struck Pentagon deal within hours. Mar 3: Altman admits 'looked opportunistic and sloppy.' Added surveillance limits. Cloud-only deployment.
market_growth.n8n_critical_rce: CVE-2026-21858 — CVSS 10.0. ~100K servers affected. AI workflow platform RCE. Validates AI toolchain attack surface.
market_growth.claude_weaponized_mexico: 1,000+ Claude Code prompts + GPT-4.1 used to breach 10 Mexican govt agencies + 1 financial institution (Dec 2025-Mar 2026). AI-powered attacks are REAL.
market_growth.chinese_labs_anthropic_abuse: DeepSeek, Moonshot AI, MiniMax: 24,000+ fraudulent accounts, 16M+ interactions on Anthropic platform.
market_growth.mcp_tenable_stat: 70% of orgs have AI/MCP third-party packages. 86% host packages with critical vulnerabilities (Tenable 2026).
market_growth.epss_over_50pct: 7,073 CVEs with >50% exploitation probability. Top 2026 CVE: CVE-2026-24061 (77.9% EPSS). NEW: CVE-2026-27180 (61.8%), CVE-2026-27174 (60.3%).
market_growth.shadow_ai_risk: 47% using GenAI via personal accounts (Netskope). Data violations doubled YoY. 92% of security pros concerned.
market_growth.nist_agentic_ai: CAISI RFI on AI agent security — deadline March 9, 2026. NCCoE draft on agent identity/authorization.
market_growth.cybersecurity_llm_development: Trend Micro (Llama 3 cybersec model, open weights), Cisco+Google+Meta collaboration
market_growth.rsa_2026: March 23-26, Moscone Center SF. Theme: Power of Community. PQC focus.
market_growth.crowdstrike_q4_earnings: March 3, 2026 — TODAY. Expected: $1.30B revenue (+22.6% YoY), $4.92B ARR (+23% YoY), EPS $1.10. $1.16B in Jan acquisitions. Startup Accelerator pitch day March 24 at RSA. FalconID GA.
market_growth.wiz_google_closing: Mid-March 2026. EU unconditional Phase I clearance Feb 10. DOJ terminated. Only AU/ZA/TR remaining. Staff $2-2.5B payout. CISPE alarmed.
market_growth.snyk_ai_security_fabric: Feb 3, 2026 — Unified SDLC security layer. Delta Findings, Agent Fix, Evo agentic system. 288% ROI (Forrester TEI). IPO dimming.
market_growth.armorcode_mcp_server: MCP Server for LLM querying. 320+ integrations, 40B findings. Anya AI 80% MTTR reduction. Closest ASPM competitor with MCP.
market_growth.semgrep_managed_scans_milestone: 1M+ weekly scans. 96% agreement with researchers. 60% false positive filtering. PHP reachability (11th lang).
market_growth.vega_security_series_b: $120M Series B, $185M total. Cloud security unicorn trajectory. 5 months after $65M Series A.
market_growth.ai_attacks_surge: AI-enhanced attacks +72% YoY. 87% of orgs experienced AI-driven incidents. Claude weaponized in 10-agency breach.
market_growth.rsa_2026_innovation_sandbox: Top 10 finalists announced. Competition March 23. Theme: operationalizing AI defense + Identity Fabric.
market_growth.nvd_critical_march_4_7: 15 critical CVEs Mar 4-7. THREE CVSS 10.0: Cisco FMC CVE-2026-20079 (auth bypass), CVE-2026-20131 (Java deser RCE), pac4j-jwt CVE-2026-29000 (JWT auth bypass). Also: SEPPmail 9.8, 2N Access 9.8, WordPress 9.8, Craft CMS 9.1x2.
market_growth.nvd_critical_march_1_3: 3 critical CVEs (CVSS 9.8): CVE-2026-2999, CVE-2026-3000 (IDExpert RCE), CVE-2026-3422 (U-Office deserialization)
market_growth.openai_codex_security: LAUNCHED Mar 6 (from Aardvark). GPT-5.2-Codex powered. Project-specific threat models, agentic vuln search, sandbox validation, architectural fixes. 50%+ FP reduction, 90%+ severity over-report reduction. 800 critical + 10,500 high findings in beta. Research preview for Enterprise/Business/Edu. Free first month. DIRECT competitor to V5 + V3.
market_growth.aws_security_agent: Multi-agent automated pen testing. Frontier agents for hours/days execution. Feb 25: shared VPC support. AWS-only. DIRECTLY competes with V5 MPTE. Differentiation: MPTE is cloud-agnostic + air-gapped.
market_growth.rsa_2026_innovation_sandbox_finalists: 10 finalists, $5M each. 6/10 are AI-security. HIGH relevance: ZeroPath (AI scanning), Clearly AI (AI code review), Geordie AI (AI agent governance), Realm Labs (AI decision visibility), Token Security (non-human identity). NO finalist occupies Decision Intelligence layer.
market_growth.ai_security_agent_benchmark_cecuro: Cecuro: Domain-specific AI agent detected 92% of DeFi exploits ($96.8M value). Generic GPT-5.1 agent detected only 34% ($7.5M). PROVES domain expertise > raw model power. VALIDATES multi-LLM consensus + CTEM+ pipeline approach.
market_growth.semgrep_wiz_integration: Code-to-cloud noise reduction. SAST findings correlated with Wiz Security Graph (cloud infra, runtime, exposure). Semgrep also launching multimodal AppSec engine (deterministic + LLM reasoning).
market_growth.ai_security_readiness_gap: Only 34% of enterprises have AI-specific security controls. <40% test AI models regularly. SAST tools cannot identify LLM-to-tool communication issues. Massive market gap for ALdeci.
market_growth.defi_offensive_ai: Frontier agents execute end-to-end exploits on 72% of known vulnerable contracts. Offensive AI advancing in parallel with defensive.
market_growth.crowdstrike_q4_result_headline: Nasdaq: 'CrowdStrike Fiscal Q4 Results Top Estimates'. Constellation: 'Strong Q4, outlook light'. Full details pending earnings call transcript.
market_growth.wiz_google_close_update: End of March 2026 close (updated from mid-March). NIS 20B value erased due to shekel strength. Procedural approvals in AU/IL remaining.
market_growth.codex_security_launch: Mar 6, 2026. Research preview. Enterprise/Business/Edu. Free first month. 50% FP reduction. 800 critical findings in beta.
market_growth.claude_firefox_cves: Mar 6, 2026. Claude Opus 4.6 + Anthropic Red Team. 6,000 C++ files. 112 reports, 22 CVEs, 14 HIGH. Fixed in Firefox 148.
market_growth.anthropic_pentagon_renegotiation: Mar 5, 2026. Amodei back at negotiating table per FT/CNBC. Legal challenge possible. 900+ employees backed Anthropic.
market_growth.snyk_credentials_manager: Mar 6, 2026. Separate storage for sensitive auth data. Table-stakes feature.
market_growth.endor_labs_auri: Mar 3, 2026. Agentic reasoning + deterministic analysis. Full-stack reachability. Closest competitor to Brain Pipeline.
market_growth.checkmarx_archipelo_partnership: Mar 3, 2026. DevSPM. AppSec detection + development context. Webinar Mar 11.
market_growth.crowdstrike_day_zero_summit: Mar 4, 2026. Threat research summit Aug 30-Sep 1, Mandalay Bay. Part of Fal.Con 2026.
market_growth.tenable_exposure_2026: Mar 2, 2026. First global exposure management conference for AI era.
market_growth.sglang_vs_vllm_2026: SGLang+LMDeploy: 16,200 TPS. vLLM: 12,500 TPS. 29% gap. Recommend SGLang for Sprint 3.
market_growth.cisco_fmc_critical: Mar 4, 2026. 48 CVEs in 25 advisories. TWO CVSS 10.0 (CVE-2026-20079, CVE-2026-20131). Unauth, no workarounds.
market_growth.pac4j_jwt_bypass: CVSS 10.0. Forge admin tokens with RSA public key. PoC published. Perfect MPTE demo target.

competitors.name: Snyk
competitors.status: IPO uncertain. AI Security Fabric launched Feb 3. Evo agentic preview. Forrester TEI: 288% ROI. Microsoft PAT change Mar 15 impacts Azure DevOps.
competitors.aldeci_advantage: Full CTEM lifecycle vs. SCA+SAST only. Multi-LLM consensus vs. single model. 97% noise reduction across ALL scanners. Brain Pipeline = decision layer ABOVE Snyk.
competitors.latest_update: 2026-03-07: Credentials Manager (Mar 6). Reachability improvements JS/Java/Python (Mar 9). Co-optation strategy — calling Claude Code Security 'great news for the industry.'

competitors.aldeci_advantage: Scanner-neutral Switzerland vs. Google lock-in. AppSec vs cloud-only. Air-gapped. PEAK Switzerland moment NOW.

competitors.status: Q4 FY2026 earnings TODAY (Mar 3 after close). Expected $1.30B revenue, $4.92B ARR. Fal.Con Gov Mar 18. RSA startup pitch Mar 24.

trends: BREAKING Mar 7: OpenAI Codex Security LAUNCHED (Mar 6) — GPT-5.2-Codex, agentic vuln hunting + sandbox validation + architectural fixes. 800 critical findings in beta. Direct V3+V5 competitor.
BREAKING Mar 7: Anthropic + Mozilla — Claude Opus 4.6 found 22 Firefox CVEs (14 HIGH) in 2 weeks scanning 6K C++ files. Validates AI-powered security auditing.
BREAKING Mar 7: Endor Labs AURI launched — agentic reasoning + deterministic analysis for 'agentic software development.' Closest to Brain Pipeline concept.
BREAKING Mar 7: Triple CVSS 10.0 week — Cisco FMC (2x unauth RCE) + pac4j-jwt (auth bypass with public key). 15 critical CVEs in 4 days.
OpenAI Aardvark evolved into Codex Security — GPT-5.2-Codex model. BIG TECH entering AppSec verification at scale.
BREAKING: RSA 2026 Innovation Sandbox — 6/10 finalists are AI-security companies, $5M per finalist
Anthropic suing Pentagon over supply chain risk designation — court battle shapes AI governance
MCP Security Crisis: 30 CVEs in 15 months, 36.7% of servers have SSRF — validates secure MCP implementation
n8n CVE-2026-21858 (CVSS 10.0): AI workflow platforms are the new attack surface
Single-LLM-provider dependency is now GEOPOLITICAL risk — one executive order can cut access
Wiz-Google $32B closing end of March 2026 — Switzerland opportunity at PEAK
Shadow AI epidemic: 47% using GenAI via personal accounts, data violations doubled YoY
Gartner validates CTEM: 3x less likely to suffer breach with CTEM programs
SGLang v0.5.8 RadixAttention: 5x faster for agent workflows, 400K+ GPUs globally
CrowdStrike Q4 earnings March 3 — market direction signal
NIST CAISI agentic AI security RFI deadline March 9 — regulation catching up
RSA 2026 (Mar 23-26) — agentic AI dominant theme, PQC production focus
OpenAI market share declining (62%→53%) — validates multi-model approach
Open-weight cybersecurity LLMs emerging (Trend Micro Llama 3, Cisco collab)
Platform consolidation: M&A at record pace (477 deals projected for 2026)
AI-generated code security emerging as new category (Claude Code Security disruption)
Post-quantum cryptography entering production (Google HTTPS PQC, OpenSSL at RSA)
differentiators: Geopolitical resilience — multi-LLM + air-gap = no single executive order can disable security AI
MCP Security Leader — authenticated, SSRF-protected, input-validated (unlike 36.7% of MCP servers)
8 built-in fallback scanners (works air-gapped, no external tools needed)
12-step Brain Pipeline (full CTEM lifecycle — Gartner validated: 3x breach reduction)
Multi-LLM Consensus (3+ LLMs vote, 85% threshold — validated by Pentagon crisis)
19-phase MPTE Verification (proves exploitability of AI toolchains like n8n)
FAIL Engine (chaos engineering for AppSec — industry first, zero competitors)
Air-gapped deployment with vLLM v0.16.0 + open-weight cybersecurity models ($0/mo)
AI-powered AutoFix with 10 fix types and confidence-based auto-apply
MCP-native with 705+ auto-discovered tools (WebMCP Chrome preview validates)
Scanner-neutral Switzerland positioning (PEAK value as Wiz → Google this month)
Quantum-secure evidence (FIPS 204 ML-DSA + RSA hybrid — 5-year head start)
AI agent security testing via MPTE — emerging attack surface (NIST CAISI RFI validates)
16-agent autonomous AI company model — unique investor narrative
Claude Code Security integration — 'Claude finds, ALdeci decides' — category creation
Aardvark/AWS response: 'One AI finding bugs is useful. Three AIs voting on what to fix is intelligence.'
Cloud-agnostic MPTE vs AWS-locked Security Agent: 'AWS tests AWS. ALdeci tests everything.'
Codex Security response: 'OpenAI scans repos. We orchestrate security postures.' — Single-repo agent vs org-wide CTEM+
Firefox validation: '22 CVEs proves AI bug-hunting works. We prove they're exploitable.' — Claude finds, ALdeci decides
Triple 10.0 CVE messaging: 'Your scanner found them. Now what? ALdeci decides.' — Decision > Detection
Pentagon resilience: 'When the Pentagon blacklists your AI vendor, ALdeci keeps running.' — V9 air-gapped = geopolitical hedge
